name: Broccoli Rabe with Olive Oil and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch (about 1 1/2 pounds) broccoli rabe, rinsed and trimmed of stems cut into 2-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a large wide saucepan with water; heat to boiling.
2. Add the broccoli rabe and salt. Boil until tender, 6 to 8 minutes.
3. Drain immediately.
4. Wipe the pan dry.
5. Add the oil, garlic, and red pepper flakes to the saucepan.
6. Heat over low heat, stirring, until warmed and garlic begins to sizzle, about 5 minutes.
7. Stir the broccoli rabe into the warm oil to coat. Serve at once.
Yield: 4 servings
